prompt: avaliar profundidade do slide s-aplicacao na aula metanalise

assertions.text: Report opens with 3-5 sentences of prose feedback for the professor
Report includes depth rubric with 8 dimensions, numeric scores, AND implication column
Report applies GRADE to at least 1 clinical claim with specific reasoning (not N/A)
Report analyzes the slide's position in the narrative arc
Report cross-references evidence-db against slide HTML
Report suggests changes in prose explaining WHY they matter
Report includes synthesis across legs with interpreted convergences
